# Custom Agents Index

This repository uses workspace-level custom agents stored under `.github/agents/`.

## Available agents

| Agent name | File | Purpose |
|------------|------|---------|
| `software-knowledge` | `.github/agents/software-knowledge.agent.md` | Aggregate, structure, and document software engineering knowledge in Docusaurus-style markdown. |

## Usage

- Use this agent when you want structured documentation output, such as guides, summaries, comparisons, and technical reference content.
- The agent is designed to produce modular Markdown suitable for Docusaurus pages.
